info.title: IPstack API
info.description: IPstack offers a powerful, real-time IP to geolocation API capable of looking up accurate location data and assessing security threats originating from risky IP addresses. Results are delivered within milliseconds in JSON or XML format. Using the IPstack API you will be able to locate website visitors at first glance and adjust your user experience and application accordingly.

get.description: The IPstack's primary endpoint is called Standard Lookup and is used to look up single IPv4 or IPv6 addresses. To call this endpoint, simply attach any IPv4 or IPv6 address to the API's base URL.

parameters.name: ip_address
parameters.description: IP address or domain to look up.

parameters.name: access_key
parameters.description: Your unique API access key used to authenticate requests.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Specify which response fields to return (e.g., `country_code`, `main`) to reduce bandwidth and speed up responses.

parameters.name: hostname
parameters.description: Set to 1 to enable Hostname Lookup.

parameters.name: security
parameters.description: Enable advanced security insights like proxy, crawler, Tor detection, threat levels, and anonymizer status.

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: Return response data in a specific language using a 2-letter language code.

parameters.name: output
parameters.description: Set to `json` or `xml` to choose between output formats.

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: Wrap the JSON response inside a JavaScript function for JSONP support.

200.description: Geolocation data for the IP address

schema.description: Response object containing detailed IP geolocation information.

hostname.description: The resolved hostname for the IP address (if requested).

type.description: Type of IP address (IPv4 or IPv6).

continent_code.description: Two-letter continent code of the IP location.

continent_name.description: Full continent name of the IP location.

country_code.description: Two-letter country code of the IP location (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2).

country_name.description: Full country name of the IP location.

region_code.description: Region or state code of the IP location.

region_name.description: Full region or state name of the IP location.

city.description: City name of the IP location.

zip.description: ZIP or postal code of the IP location.

latitude.description: Latitude coordinate of the IP location.

longitude.description: Longitude coordinate of the IP location.

calling_code.description: International calling code of the country.

is_eu.description: Indicates if the country is a member of the European Union.

country_flag.description: URL to the country's flag image.

country_flag_emoji.description: Emoji representation of the country's flag.

languages.description: List of languages spoken in the country.

time_zone.description: Time zone information for the IP location.

current_time.description: Current local time in the given time zone.

is_daylight_saving.description: Indicates if daylight saving time is in effect.

currency.description: Currency information of the IP location.

plural.description: Plural form of the currency name.

connection.description: Connection details of the IP address.

asn.description: Autonomous System Number (ASN) of the IP connection.

isp.description: Internet Service Provider (ISP) of the IP connection.

sld.description: Second-level domain preceding the top-level domain (e.g., "home" in www.home.neustar).

tld.description: Top-level domain, the most general part of a domain (e.g., com, net, edu, country codes).

carrier.description: Name of the organization owning the ASN, responsible for network traffic.

home.description: Indicates if the connection is from a residential network (true/false).

organization_type.description: Classification of the registering organization's type (e.g., Insurance, Banking, Education, etc).

isic_code.description: Returns International Standard Industrial Classification code, Rev. 4, of the organization type.

naics_code.description: Returns North American Industry Classification System code, v2007, of the organization type.

security.description: Security details of the IP address.

is_proxy.description: Indicates if the IP address is associated with a proxy.

proxy_type.description: Type of proxy (e.g., VPN, hosting, residential).

is_crawler.description: Indicates if the IP address is associated with a web crawler.

is_tor.description: Indicates if the IP address belongs to the Tor network.

threat_level.description: Overall threat level assessment of the IP address.

threat_types.description: List of specific threat types associated with the IP address.

anonymizer_status.description: Anonymizing proxy status of an IP address – active, suspect, inactive, or private.

proxy_last_detected.description: Last detection date of an active anonymizing proxy (yyyy-mm-dd). IPv6 supported.

proxy_level.description: Degree of IP concealment by the proxy – transparent, anonymous, distorting, or elite.

vpn_service.description: VPN service name for IPs with anonymizer_status 'private' and proxy_type 'service' (VPN). Not applicable for IPv6.

hosting_facility.description: Indicates if the IP is from a hosting facility (true/false).

standardResponse.summary: Example response for a single IP

get.description: The IPstack API also offers a separate API endpoint capable of detecting the IP address which the current API request is coming from. In order to use this endpoint, simply append `check` to the API's base URL and specify your preferred optional parameters.

parameters.name: access_key
parameters.description: Your unique API access key used to authenticate requests.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Specify response fields to return (comma-separated) to reduce payload size.

parameters.name: hostname
parameters.description: Include the resolved hostname in the response (0 = exclude, 1 = include).

parameters.name: security
parameters.description: Include security module in the response (proxy, crawler, Tor, threat level, etc.).

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: Return location names in a specified language (using a 2-letter language code).

parameters.name: output
parameters.description: Set to `json` or `xml` to choose between output formats.

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: Wrap the response in a JSONP callback function.

get.description: The IPstack API also offers the ability to request data for multiple IPv4 or IPv6 addresses at the same time. In order to process IP addresses in bulk, simply append multiple comma-separated IP addresses to the API's base URL.

parameters.name: ip_addresses
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of up to 50 IP addresses to look up.

parameters.name: access_key
parameters.description: Your unique API access key used to authenticate requests.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Specify response fields to return (comma-separated) to reduce payload size.

parameters.name: hostname
parameters.description: Include the resolved hostname in the response (0 = exclude, 1 = include).

parameters.name: security
parameters.description: Include security insights (proxy/crawler/Tor detection, threat level, etc.) (0 = exclude, 1 = include).

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: Return location names in a specified language (2-letter language code).

parameters.name: output
parameters.description: Set to `json` or `xml` to choose between output formats.

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: Wrap the response in a JSONP callback function.

items.description: Array of geolocation response objects when multiple IPs are queried.
